spec_match.rationale: Dispatches child pointer events to A/B before placing them in an untrusted parent, then verifies the returned coalesced sub-events keep those original targets.

interactive.rationale: The two target areas collect trusted browser input, and buttons run modern untrusted dispatch plus the pre-130 retarget simulation with live table/log output.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now contrasts trusted browser targeting, modern untrusted A/B preservation, and a pre-130 parent-retargeted counterfactual.

summary: Chrome DevTools MCP pre-fix verification found a single synthetic button with no trusted-input lane or pre-130 contrast. The repaired page now records trusted browser pointer input from target A/B, dispatches untrusted coalesced events whose original targets are established by pre-dispatching child events, and includes a pre-130 retarget simulation.
